name: USQualityCoreNutritionOrder
title: US Quality Core NutritionOrder
publisher: Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology (ONC)

contact.name: Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology (ONC)

description: Defines constraints and extensions on the NutritionOrder resource for the minimal set of data to query and retrieve a patient's Nutrition Order.

element.short: proposal | plan | directive | order | original-order | reflex-order | filler-order | instance-order | option
The person who requires the diet, formula or nutritional supplement
element.definition: The person (patient) who needs the nutrition order for an oral diet, nutritional supplement and/or enteral or formula feeding.
element.requirements: The person who requires the diet, formula or nutritional supplement.
